item.title: 1996 Lexus LS 400 Review and Inspection
item.description: A detailed look at the 1996 Lexus LS 400. Focus on reliability, condition, and what makes this luxury sedan a standout for long-term ownership and maintenance.

item.title: Finding a Car Battery Drain Issue
item.description: Diagnosing an electrical battery drain in a vehicle. Shows step-by-step troubleshooting, testing components, and identifying the source of power loss in a car system.

item.title: Fixing a Frozen Car Problem Explained
item.description: A breakdown of how cold weather can freeze vehicle components. Shows diagnosis, thawing methods, and practical tips to get a frozen car running again safely.
